name: notion-automation
description: Automate Notion tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): pages, databases, blocks, comments, users. Always search tools first for current schemas.
capabilities: Create, update, and archive Notion pages via MCP tools
Query Notion databases with filters and pagination
Manage blocks: append, replace, and delete content
Create and modify database schemas and properties
List workspace users and manage page comments
Resolve page names to IDs for reliable automation
author: sickn33
securitySummary: All 79 static findings are false positives. This is documentation-only content (SKILL.md) providing Notion API tool sequences via Rube MCP. The 'external_commands' detections are markdown code formatting backticks, 'network' is a legitimate MCP server endpoint, and 'system reconnaissance' detections refer to Notion API operations (search/query), not system scanning.
valueStatement: Manual Notion management is time-consuming. This skill provides AI assistants with tool sequences to automate page creation, database queries, block management, and comments via Rube MCP.
userTitle: Automate Notion Tasks with Claude Code
limitations: Requires Rube MCP connection with active Notion OAuth
Cannot modify formula, rollup, or relation property types directly
Pages and databases must be shared with the Notion integration to be accessible

useCases.title: Project Management Automation
useCases.description: Automate creation of project tracking pages and database entries. Create sprint boards, task lists, and status updates automatically.

useCases.title: Content Workflow Automation
useCases.description: Automate content pipelines: create drafts, update editorial databases, and manage publishing workflows in Notion.

useCases.title: Team Knowledge Base Management
useCases.description: Automate documentation creation and updates. Keep team wikis organized with automatic page generation and structured databases.

promptTemplates.title: Create a New Page
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the Notion automation skill to create a new page under the parent page called 'Projects' with the title 'Q1 Planning' and properties: Status = 'In Progress', Assignee = 'John Doe'.

promptTemplates.title: Query Database with Filter
promptTemplates.prompt: Query the 'Tasks' database to find all items where Status equals 'Completed' and sort by Due Date descending. Show the first 10 results.

promptTemplates.title: Automate Weekly Report
promptTemplates.prompt: Search for all pages created this week in the 'Weekly Reports' database. For each, fetch the status and add a comment with 'Review complete' if status is 'Done'.

promptTemplates.title: Build Content Pipeline
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a workflow that: 1) Creates a new page in 'Content Calendar' with title from user input, 2) Sets Status to 'Draft', 3) Appends an outline block with suggested sections, 4) Creates a comment alerting the editor.

bestPractices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get current tool schemas before starting any workflow
Verify connection status shows ACTIVE before running automation workflows
Handle pagination properly by checking has_more and using start_cursor for large result sets
antiPatterns: Assuming pages are accessible without checking if they are shared with the Notion integration
Using wrong property names or case-sensitive names in filters causing validation errors
Ignoring pagination and missing results beyond the first page

faq.question: Do I need API keys to use this skill?
faq.answer: No API keys are required. The skill uses Rube MCP which handles Notion OAuth authentication. Just add the MCP endpoint and authenticate through Notion.

faq.question: Can this skill delete pages permanently?
faq.answer: No. The archive function sets archived=true which is a soft-delete. Pages can be restored by updating the archived property back to false.

faq.question: Why am I getting 404 errors when searching for pages?
faq.answer: 404 errors usually mean the page or database is not shared with the Notion integration. Go to Notion, find the page, click share, and invite the integration.

faq.question: Can I modify formula or rollup properties?
faq.answer: No. Formula, rollup, created_time, and read-only fields cannot be modified via the API. These must be set manually in Notion.

faq.question: How do I handle pagination for large databases?
faq.answer: Check the has_more flag in responses. If true, use the start_cursor value in your next request to get the next page of results.

faq.question: What is the difference between child_blocks and content_blocks?
faq.answer: Use content_blocks when adding blocks to pages. The child_blocks parameter will fail validation and cause errors.
